error_signature: The resource you are requesting could not be found
title: Google Drive file not found error during rename
symptom: When attempting to rename a file in Google Drive, n8n returns a 'resource not found' error with a 404 status code.
not_this_if: File ID is hardcoded and correct
root_cause: The error occurs because the file ID being referenced in the Google Drive node is either incorrect or not available in the context of the workflow. This can happen if the ID is not properly passed from a previous node or if the Merge node is not configured correctly.
fix_steps: Ensure the file ID is correctly referenced from the previous node
Use the Combine option in the Merge node instead of Append
Test the workflow again to confirm the file can be renamed
agent_instruction: Check the file ID reference and adjust the Merge node settings to Combine.
